data.title: Ex-Google Chief Eric Schmidt Backs Firms Behind Blockchain Credit Bureau
data.description:
• PASS creates modern credit rails for wallets, dApps, and embedded finance, while allowing for pseudonymous lending and borrowing based on trusted credentials.
  • Eric Schmidt has been involved in the blockchain and crypto space for some time, having joined Chainlink Labs as a strategic adviser back in early 2023.

data.title: Crypto Lender Maple Finance Expands to Solana With Chainlink
data.description:
• Maple’s token, syrupUSDC, will be accessible on Solana-native platforms including Kamino and Orca.
  • Robinhood-backed stablecoin consortium, the Global Dollar Network (GDN), is also supporting the launch

data.title: AVAX Drops 5%, Forming Bearish Pattern on Short Time Frame
data.description:
• Avalanche's token AVAX traded within a 5.5% range, fluctuating between $21.16 and $19.98.
  • Strong resistance at $20.68 and a bearish pattern pushed AVAX below the $20.10 support level.

data.title: APT Slips 4% After Breaking $4.77 Technical Support Level
data.description:
• APT slipped 4% as geopolitical tensions rattled markets.
  • The token is consolidating around the 4.77 support level, and has reclaimed some of its losses.

data.title: HyperLiquid's Market Making Vault Grows by $250M in 2 Months Despite JELLY Fiasco
data.description:
• HyperLiquid's yield vault surged from $163M to $418M in two months, recovering from March’s JELLY market fiasco.
  • A forced market closure and dramatic trader activity helped reverse a steep TVL drop from $510M to $150M.
  • Current vault yield sits at 13.42% annually, outpacing popular restaking protocols offering around 9%.

data.title: TON Surges 3%, Outperforming Declining CoinDesk 20
data.description:
• The cryptocurrency TON rallied 3%, with support holding at the $3.17-$3.18 zone.
  • Trading volume for TON surged to over 6.6 million, nearly triple the 24-hour average, establishing resistance at $3.25.
  • The CoinDesk 20 index fell 1.7% in the last 24 hours, contrasting with TON's performance.

data.title: Corporate Bitcoin Holdings Nears $85B, More Than Doubling in a Year
data.description:
• The number of public companies holding bitcoin in their treasuries has increased to 116, with a combined total of 809,100 BTC as of the end of May.
  • This represents a significant rise from 312,200 BTC held by corporate treasuries a year ago, with nearly 100,000 BTC added since early April alone.
  • There was also a rapid rise in tokenized real-world assets (RWAs), which have grown over 260% to $23 billion this year.

data.title: Leveraged Bitcoin Longs on Bitfinex Weakest Since December and It Could Mean Rally Time
data.description:
• Leveraged bitcoin longs on Bitfinex have dropped to their lowest since December, suggesting a possible bullish trend for Bitcoin.
  • Contrary indicators in financial markets can often signal the opposite of their apparent direction.
  • Historically, increases in Bitfinex long positions have coincided with bitcoin price declines, while decreases have aligned with price rises.

data.title: Bitcoin Life Insurance Firm Meanwhile Shares First Audit
data.description:
• Meanwhile, a Bermuda-based life insurance firm, has released its 2024 audited financial statements, making it one of the first companies fully denominated in bitcoin to do so.
  • The firm operates by having clients pay and receive life insurance payouts in bitcoin, with payments unaffected by shifts in the dollar value of BTC.
  • Meanwhile's audit revealed total assets of 220.4 BTC and a net income of 25.29 BTC for the year ending December 31, 2024.

data.title: Core Foundation, Bitcoin Layer 1 With Over $500M Staked BTC, Adds BitGo and KODA as Validators
data.description:
• Core Foundation has announced BitGo and KODA as new validators, enhancing institutional adoption of Bitcoin-native DeFi.
  • BitGo's involvement brings regulatory credibility, while KODA's integration expands Core's presence in Asia.
  • The Core blockchain uses a hybrid consensus mechanism to combine Proof of Work and Proof of Stake, ensuring security and scalability.
